tasks.title: Wind Farm Downtime Analysis
tasks.description: A wind farm's turbine sensors went offline for 6 hours. Fill gaps using linear interpolation and calculate total energy loss.
tasks.briefing: The client needs a report showing: (1) interpolated power values, (2) estimated revenue loss at $50/MWh.

testCases.message: All missing values must be handled

hints: Power is in kW, convert to MWh for revenue calc

tasks.title: Fraud Detection Latency Spike
tasks.description: Payment alerts are arriving late for a subset of transactions. Identify impacted regions and quantify average delay.
tasks.briefing: Pinpoint regions where alert latency exceeds 120 seconds and report median delay + total volume impacted.

testCases.message: Median delay should be computed in seconds

tasks.title: Inventory Crash After Flash Sale
tasks.description: Inventory counts diverged after a flash sale. Reconcile SKU stock using orders + warehouse logs.
tasks.briefing: Reconcile stock by SKU. The client needs a list of SKUs where reconciled stock is below reorder threshold (25 units).

testCases.check: all([isinstance(sku, str) for sku in low_stock_skus])
testCases.message: Ensure output is a list of SKU strings

hints: Fill missing warehouse stock values with latest known
